name: Frozen Core Shard
description: A fragment taken from the core of a fallen construct. Its pulse resonates with larger beings of ice and stone.

name: Time Device
description: An impossible mechanism that ticks against reality itself. The Entity stirs when it resonates.

name: Heaven's Tear Earring
description: A luminous pearl once worn by a saint. Its holiness echoes across realms.

name: Overripe Grape Cluster
description: Sweet and pungent, these grapes rot in place. Something winged waits for nightfall.

name: Oozing Pulp Chunk
description: A piece of desert cactus, leaking sticky fluid. It stirs something thorny.

name: Curved Fishbone
description: A gleaming, curved spine picked clean. Cats can't resist the scent.

name: Black Mirror Shard
description: A jagged shard that reflects nothing. Death gazes through it, unseen.

name: Glinting Goblin Fang
description: A chipped golden tooth, stolen and re-stolen. It pulses with greedy memories.

name: Tribal Heirloom
description: A decorated weapon sheath inlaid with rare metals and gems. To goblins, it is more than a relic, it is a symbol of leadership. The Warchief will stop at nothing to claim it.

name: Gnawed Acorn
description: A cracked forest nut, its surface etched with tiny bite marks. Something small remembers.

name: Calcified Shell Core
description: A weathered lump of reefstone. Hermits gather where the tides once whispered.

name: Frozen Heart Crystal
description: A flawless gem, cold as death. Those bound by frost feel its call.

name: Blank Pact Scroll
description: A clean parchment soaked in ash. Devils ink their names when the time is right.

name: Frozen Core Shard
description: A fragment taken from the core of a fallen construct. Its pulse resonates with larger beings of ice and stone.

name: Royal Jelly Clot
description: Luminous nectar once meant for a queen. Her children will come to claim it.

name: Soldier Termite
description: A hardened desert insect, still twitching. Its scent invites an ancient rival.

name: Fresh Kill Slab
description: Raw, bloodied meat still warm to the touch. The air thickens with predator breath.

name: Spider Web Coil
description: A tightly woven mass of enchanted silk. It hums faintly, as if something waits within.

name: Buzzing Hive Fragment
description: A honey-soaked hive chunk, vibrating faintly. The swarm is never far behind.

name: Sunborn Petal Tuft
description: A soft, glowing sprig that shimmers in the light. Whispers of joy trail behind it.

name: Tactical Power Node
description: A self-contained energy core used by advanced combat units. When activated, it emits a signal only the strongest turtle weapon-platform can answer.

name: Fragment of the Pale Moon
description: Cold to the touch and humming with silver light. The beast inside begins to stir.

name: Worm-Eaten Sediment
description: A clump of ancient mud riddled with tiny burrows. Something still moves inside.

name: Lost Shoe
description: A worn shoe caked in mud, abandoned in the dark. The zombie horde sniffs out the trail of the fallen.
